candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortization included in - Production costs
candidates.why: Explicitly labelled as included in Production costs, and Production costs/Cost of revenues/COGS is already the selected COGS bucket. This is a sub-component, so adding it separately would double count.

Appears within the Production costs section and is part of the Production costs build-up rather than a separate same-level operating line. Since Production costs/COGS is already selected, this should not be added separately.

variables.notes: Selected COGS rows are total/parent rows. The visible COGS-related D&A rows are embedded components of Production costs/COGS, not separate add-on lines.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortization included in Research and development costs
candidates.why: Explicitly included in the already selected Research and Development Costs row. Also R&D is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding this separately would be inappropriate and risks distortion/double counting.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortisation in Distribution Costs
candidates.why: Explicitly included in the already selected Sales and distribution costs row, so it is a sub-component of the selected XSGA bucket and should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortization included in Administrative costs
candidates.why: Explicitly included in the already selected Administrative Costs row, so it is already embedded in the selected XSGA bucket and should not be added separately.

variables.notes: All visible SG&A/R&D-related D&A rows are labelled as included in already selected parent operating expense rows (R&D, distribution, administrative). No separate same-level SG&A D&A summary line is shown that should be added later.
